title: Mazuma
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{CelestialBody |image= |name=Mazuma |region=*[[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} — Based on corresponding data for [[Mazuma system/Legends|Mazuma system]] *[[Trans-Hydian/Legends|Trans-Hydian]]The [[:File:MiscellaneousRegions.jpg|Client States and Miscellaneous Regions map]] in ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' places the entirety of grid square Q-6 in the [[Trans-Hydian/Legends|Trans-Hydian Borderlands]]. |sector=[[Nuiri sector/Legends|Nuiri sector]] |system=[[Mazuma system/Legends|Mazuma system]] |coordinates=Q-6 |xyz= |distance= |suns= |orbited= |position= |moons= |routes= |lengthday= |lengthyear= |class= |diameter= |atmosphere= |climate= |gravity= |terrain= |water= |interest=[[Lucre Cosminational Bank]]{{StoryCite|story=The Flight of the Falcon|book=The Empire Strikes Back Monthly 157}} |flora= |fauna= |otherlife= |species= |otherspecies= |socialgroup= |language= |government= |population= |demonym= |cities= |imports= |exports= |affiliation= }} {{Quote|Where to now, Han?''"
"''First stop, planet Mazuma, where we'll find 200,000 credits at Lucre Cosminational Bank, courtesy of ''Rebel Fighter Command''!|[[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] and [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]|}} '''Mazuma''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Mazuma system/Legends|Mazuma system]], within the [[Nuiri sector/Legends|Nuiri sector]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy's]] [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]], that was site of the [[Lucre Cosminational Bank]]. {{Planet-stub}} ==Behind the scenes== Mazuma is a slang word for money, derived from Yiddish word mezumen (meaning "cash"). ==Appearances== *{{StoryCite|story=The Flight of the Falcon|book=The Empire Strikes Back Monthly 157|reprint=1}} {{1stm}} {{Nc}} {{Ncm}} ==Sources== *''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' {{1stp}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |es=Mazuma }} [[Category:Nuiri sector locations]] [[Category:Planets in the Outer Rim Territories]] [[Category:Planets in the Trans-Hydian Borderlands]]
